title: Tenant Associations - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Tenant Associations 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY ALLIANCE OF TENANTS RENTERS' RIGHTS HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a renters' rights hotline in Oregon. Topics include fair housing protections, evictions, terminations, repair concerns, security deposits, and rent increase limits, etc. Does not provide information for landlords. Priority is given to renters in Southern and Central Oregon, Mid-Valley, and Portland/Tri-County area. Residents of all other Oregon regions strongly encouraged to become members to receive prioritized assistance. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Hotline intake and callbacks: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday 1pm-5pm, Tuesday 5pm-8pm Member's Live Hotline: Tuesday 6pm-7pm, Saturday 1pm-2pm Email (503) 288-0130 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
